finding: Proposal validation emitted the same SHA-256 digest with and without the `sha256:` prefix, then treated the formatting difference as a stale-file mismatch and blocked a legitimate fail-closed Team start.
expectedBehavior: Compare normalized SHA-256 digest values while retaining every other proposal validation issue as blocking.
evidenceOrRepro: Reproduced by the first formal TASK-TEAM-0074 L5 start: `195ea...8372` matched semantically but gate rejected it because `currentFileHash` included the prefix.
followUp: Keep a regression for prefixed/unprefixed equal hashes and a separate mismatch rejection.
